overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character navigates neon-lit streets, crosses intersections, ascends outdoor stairs, and walks through covered urban passages with futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under highway overpass

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street toward the outdoor staircase
approaching the wide outdoor staircase leading to upper street level

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with a distinctive backpack through the covered street and crossing the road toward a staircase

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with colorful backpack walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass covering the street with large support pillars
tall teal building with vertical illuminated 'SECUTOR' signage
large illuminated red advertisement sign on building facade
wide concrete stairs with red-brown sides leading to upper street level
small storefront with glowing orange signage and blue awning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive highway overpass in a futuristic city, with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. The player follows a character with a distinctive backpack through the covered street, passing a building with 'SECUTOR' signage, then crosses a multi-lane road toward a wide outdoor staircase.

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into natural dusk light while ascending
reaching the top of the stairs and transitioning to level walking

agents.ego_description: climbing the outdoor concrete stairs following the character in the blue jacket toward the upper street level

notable_agents.action: character in blue jacket and orange pants ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: building exterior with pink neon strip lighting and multiple windows
tall futuristic towers visible against the dusk sky at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide outdoor staircase flanked by buildings, transitioning from the shadowy overpass area into the warm light of dusk. The teal building on the right features pink neon accents, while futuristic skyscrapers become visible against the evening sky at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the building facades and holographic advertisements
approaching a major intersection with traffic and larger crowds

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated sidewalk while looking up at the towering buildings and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall building covered in giant glowing billboards and holographic displays featuring product advertisements
elevated train track structure running parallel to the street with support beams
tall pole with multiple light fixtures and attached traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated sidewalk, the scene opens up to reveal towering buildings covered in massive holographic advertisements and glowing billboards. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the architecture against the dusk sky, with a monorail track visible on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with vehicle traffic and pedestrians

events.description: waiting at intersection as futuristic cars pass by before crossing
turquoise retro-futuristic sedan drives through the intersection
entering covered walkway under building overhang with pink neon lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating the crosswalk at a busy intersection, waiting for vehicles to pass before continuing toward the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: turquoise retro-futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tunnel-like passage under a building with glowing pink interior lighting visible
futuristic signal pole with illuminated walk indicators and red casing
large architectural overpass connecting buildings above the street level

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic and various futuristic vehicles passing by. After waiting for a turquoise car to pass, the character crosses the street toward a covered walkway entrance that glows with distinctive pink neon lighting from within.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the pink-lit covered passage with dramatic change in ambient lighting
futuristic purple car drives through the covered street passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway illuminated by pink neon ceiling panels, approaching the brighter exit ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair standing near the street corner

entered.detail: glowing rectangular light panels emitting magenta light onto the wet street below
sleek dark car with illuminated accents driving through the passage

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway, the scene is dominated by vibrant pink neon ceiling panels casting colorful reflections on the wet pavement. The character walks past other pedestrians toward a brighter exit at the far end, while a sleek purple vehicle drives through the illuminated passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowy depths of a highway overpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated heights of a futuristic city at dusk. It begins under a massive concrete structure where wet asphalt reflects neon lights, following a character past a Secutor building and across a multi-lane road. As the character ascends a wide outdoor staircase, the scene transitions from the dim underpass into the warm glow of evening, revealing teal buildings with pink accents and towering skyscrapers against the darkening sky. The view then expands along an elevated sidewalk to showcase massive holographic advertisements and a monorail track before the camera moves through a busy intersection filled with futuristic vehicles. Finally, the journey leads into a covered walkway dominated by vibrant pink neon ceiling panels that cast colorful reflections on the pavement as the character heads toward a bright exit.
